transcript.text: Another video request uh mark del rio hi kyle how are you next video request can you please talk
About your thoughts on street performing in general also if you had the chance to do that
Kind of thing then what would you like to perform whatever your main specialty will be and why
Thank you and have a nice day um what do I think about street performing I think it's cool I think
It brings life to the city life to the community um in the modern world
The whole sense of community is kind of uh going away people live in their
Suburban neighborhoods where people just go in and out of their houses and there's no corner store
And there's not that not as many parks and the neighbors don't really talk to each other and
When you go downtown you would go and buy something and go home you know and there's
Cities the new developments aren't really being built with um like pedestrian malls and this kind
Of a thing as much and um street performers are a great glue to bring society together
Um you know kind of like in the past where you'd have the church and where everybody would go to
The church and the pastor would be the street performer and they're in the middle of the church
Preaching to the people and talking uh yeah street performers uh I think any town with a lot of street
Performers um you know it's it's always it's it's great to just go out and just people watch you
Know watch all the people like 30 people gathered around somebody watch the people watching the person
Watch the person and and then uh go to the next street performer and uh it's a great yeah a great way to
Bring the culture together and the people together um and uh it's interesting it's cool to watch people
Do stuff in real life um boulder where I'm from has a lot of street performers and you'd have the same
Guys out in the same area you know for years at a time and they can do really cool stuff we got some
Rasta guy who can do he's really flexible and can fit himself inside boxes and do the splits and then
There's some dude who can throw cards really far there's some kid who knows the zip code of every
Single town in america you just name the town and he knows the zip code to it um and then you could
Just get beggars um who say stuff interesting like write poems or whatever on the cardboard and I think
It's funny and uh yeah I think the beggars are kind of like I guess they're street performers they
Decorate the the uh the the common area for everybody else sit around and you know bring
Life to it and as long as they're not harassing people for money I don't think it's begging for
Money is a bad thing I mean you don't have to give money to them I don't give money to street beggars
Uh they're all over boulder more than anywhere else I've seen um but uh but the street performers are
People who uh I like them I think they're cool now I'd loved I thought about being a street performer
Uh I think being a street performer isn't like doing a new kind of street performance is cool
I like I like in original stuff um I like the people who do the physical stuff if I were a street
Performer I would I like to um multitask so if I was a street performer I'd like to be doing something
That's good for me that's making me a better person while I'm making money on the street so I would do
Something like I do physical stuff you know I get I get really flexible and I do the splits for people
And then I do back flips and handstand push-ups and stuff for people that would be my street
Performing it'd be kind of like going to the gym but getting paid for it and being under the sun
And uh that's what I would do but uh um but also preaching I think that's a cool way for street
Performer like like the end of the world the end of the world is not jesus jesus is gonna follow jesus
Or the devil's gonna burn your hell burn your soul um that kind of stuff people out there talking
Thinking they're making the world a better place um is commendable and I think it can be a good
Uh beneficial to the people around them I mean if people go to the church
And um and watch some dude blab about what he's his religious beliefs then why not just
Some street guy you know if it becomes more of a cultural thing then that street guy could actually
Be quite good and could could make money just from donations from from speaking his truth and then he
Could pass out the pamphlets you know or a little little like cards or something little educational
Things or you can show graphs with his little you know black whiteboard that he brings with him I don't

Uh completely like uh regulated though you know not totally anarchical yeah you have to you should be
Able to get permits and if somebody you know there should be a certain like decibel noise level
Maximum that you can have and a certain amount of feet that that that separate you know when you go to a
Like outdoor concerts with a lot of different bands you would have a band and you can totally
Hear the band when you're within the band group but then you move out of their area and then you're

Here first it's like well I've got the permit so get out of here I'll call the cops and so
Um yeah it should be like that and now like yeah if they should pay rent or something well it should
Be totally organic you know I mean if it becomes crowded and a lot of street performers just start
Making a ton of money then then uh then they I think the government should start you know charging

You could do something like that um so yeah I think the future of street performing is pretty
